agent_decision_rationale_critical.decision_rationale: Net obligation ZAR 120M exceeds JSE CRITICAL threshold of ZAR 100M triggering immediate intervention requirement. Systemic risk flag prevents automated LOLR execution requiring human oversight despite adequate BBB+ credit rating and healthy CIS integration.

CIS_UNAVAILABLE flag creates complete operational blind spot for ZAR 55M exposure preventing real-time risk assessment. TCP timeout since May 6th compounds uncertainty requiring immediate human intervention to establish alternative monitoring approach.

JSE watchlist entry due to FSCA market manipulation investigation overrides net obligation assessment per regulatory escalation rules. B+ credit rating and four recent margin calls support elevated risk classification requiring regulatory compliance oversight.

cis_unavailable_flags.description: CIS integration timeout - counterparty data unavailable
